commit.message:
fix: getRkey returns undefined due to missing backward compatibility (#639)

* Initial plan

* fix: getRkey returns undefined due to incorrect result.rkeys access

NC's get_rkey API returns the array directly, not wrapped in {rkeys: [...]}.
Update response type and return result directly instead of result.rkeys.

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/KarinJS/Karin/sessions/6b38a5f8-df8c-4850-8748-d81b25ba5d67

Co-authored-by: sj817 <74231782+sj817@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: add backward compatibility for getRkey response format

Handle both old {rkeys: [...]} format and new NC array-direct format
by dynamically checking with Array.isArray() at runtime.

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/KarinJS/Karin/sessions/48097dea-521a-4691-b174-ed811aede7fd

Co-authored-by: sj817 <74231782+sj817@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: sj817 <74231782+sj817@users.noreply.github.com>

verification.payload:
tree 3020435fbd4658a1c28363454c24e4a114fdc1f9
parent 55754bb1009e1f97a82be68d468707b24c315d15
author Copilot <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com> 1775051890 +0800
committer GitHub <noreply@github.com> 1775051890 +0800

commit.message:
fix: close #615; 适配合并转发的外显参数 (#616)

* fix: 修复合并转发外显参数(prompt/summary/source/news)无效问题

在OneBot API params类型中添加可选的外显参数字段
在NodeCustomMessage中添加news字段支持嵌套转发外显
在core适配器中正确传递和处理外显参数
确保外显参数同时存在于API请求顶层和node数据内

* fix: 解决Node.js>=25版本启动崩溃问题

将jsonwebtoken从devDependencies移至dependencies
升级jsonwebtoken到9.0.3(原版,修复SlowBuffer兼容性)
添加@types/jsonwebtoken到开发依赖提供类型支持
防止jsonwebtoken被tsup打包,使用系统安装版本

修复: https://github.com/KarinJS/Karin/issues/615

verification.payload:
tree 8898e51b3fd46425fb655129ffe8bb227ffa481f
parent c281d40af11bc1a87bcf275a7e0d45a04b839df4
author 时瑾 <shijinn520@gmail.com> 1771834871 +0800
committer GitHub <noreply@github.com> 1771834871 +0800
